articles.title: White House Insider Confesses: How I Kept RFK Jr. Out to Protect Pharma Interests
articles.summary: Former White House public health official admits to deliberately blocking Robert F. Kennedy Jr. from influencing policy, revealing the coordinated effort to silence vaccine critics and protect pharmaceutical profits. The confession exposes how political operatives served as gatekeepers for industry interests over public health transparency.

articles.title: Big Pharma's Strawberry Suppression: Why Fisetin Research Gets Buried While Patent Pills Profit
articles.summary: New studies prove strawberry compound fisetin reverses vascular aging and clears senescent cells more effectively than expensive pharmaceuticals. Yet this natural anti-aging breakthrough remains buried while Big Pharma pushes patented alternatives that can't match nature's efficacy.

articles.title: Century of Medical Tyranny Exposed: From Flexner Report to FDA's War on Natural Healing
articles.summary: New manifesto reveals the systematic dismantling of holistic medicine through coordinated corporate and government assault spanning over 100 years. Documents how pioneers like Benedict Lust were persecuted while pharmaceutical monopolies cemented their stranglehold on healthcare.

articles.title: Your Mouth Reveals What Medicine Won't: Oral Microbiome Predicts Death Better Than Blood Tests
articles.summary: Groundbreaking research shows oral bacteria patterns predict lifespan and disease risk more accurately than conventional diagnostics, yet mainstream medicine ignores this accessible biomarker. The findings threaten expensive testing monopolies by proving a simple mouth swab outperforms costly procedures.

articles.title: Top Cancer Researcher Caught Red-Handed: Major Retraction Exposes Research Fraud
articles.summary: Leading cancer researcher forced to retract key study amid fraud allegations, highlighting the systemic corruption in oncology research. The case reveals how prestigious journals and institutions protect fraudulent researchers while suppressing legitimate challenges to cancer orthodoxy.

articles.title: FDA Enables ImmunityBio's $2B Cancer Scam: Agency's Cozy Relationship With Biotech Exposed
articles.summary: ImmunityBio loses $2 billion market cap after FDA finally flags misleading cancer claims, revealing how regulatory capture allows biotech companies to defraud investors for years. The delayed action exposes the agency's systematic failure to protect patients and investors from medical fraud.

articles.title: Psychiatry's Paxil Cover-Up Continues: Journal Refuses Retraction Despite $3B Settlement for Fraud
articles.summary: Despite GlaxoSmithKline paying billions for hiding Paxil's dangers, psychiatric journals still won't retract the fraudulent safety studies that enabled mass prescription of deadly antidepressants. The psychiatric establishment prioritizes reputation over patient lives by issuing worthless 'expressions of concern' instead of full retractions.

articles.title: Peer Review Gatekeepers Exposed: How Academic Cartels Suppress Revolutionary Research
articles.summary: New analysis reveals how the peer review system has become a weapon of scientific censorship, allowing establishment gatekeepers to suppress breakthrough research that threatens entrenched interests. The broken system rewards conformity while burying innovations that could transform medicine.

articles.title: White House Insider Confesses: I Blocked RFK Jr. from West Wing While Serving Pharma
articles.summary: Former White House public health official admits to deliberately keeping Robert F. Kennedy Jr. away from policy discussions. The confession reveals how establishment gatekeepers actively suppress voices challenging vaccine orthodoxy and pharmaceutical interests.

articles.title: Strawberry Compound Fisetin Destroys 'Zombie Cells'—Ignored by Mainstream Medicine
articles.summary: Groundbreaking research shows fisetin reverses vascular aging by clearing senescent cells and boosting glutathione production. This natural longevity breakthrough gets buried while Big Pharma pushes expensive synthetic alternatives.

articles.title: Century of Medical Tyranny Exposed: From Flexner Report to FDA Persecution
articles.summary: New manifesto documents how corporations systematically dismantled holistic healing through regulatory capture. The Flexner Report weaponized medical education while FDA continues persecuting alternative therapies that threaten pharmaceutical profits.

articles.title: Your Mouth Bacteria Predicts Death—Medical Establishment Ignores Oral-Systemic Connection
articles.summary: Research reveals oral microbiome imbalances correlate with accelerated aging, cancer, and heart disease even without gum disease. This paradigm-shifting connection between mouth bacteria and lifespan gets minimal attention from conventional medicine.

articles.title: Hidden Vaccine Dangers Exposed: From 1853 Mandates to Cutter Incident Cover-ups
articles.summary: New book reveals historical pattern of vaccine coercion through fear and legal force, highlighting suppressed disasters like the 1955 Cutter Incident. Documents how rushed approvals and corporate liability shields endanger public health.

articles.title: First COVID Indictment Drops—Will Washington's Wall of Secrecy Finally Crack?
articles.summary: Federal indictment marks breakthrough in COVID accountability after years of stonewalling and cover-ups. This could open floodgates for prosecuting officials who suppressed treatments, silenced scientists, and violated constitutional rights.

articles.title: Target Fauci Lieutenant: Greg Folkers Should Be Next COVID Indictment
articles.summary: Brownstone Institute identifies Greg Folkers as key Fauci deputy who helped orchestrate COVID response deception. His role in gain-of-function funding and treatment suppression makes him prime candidate for criminal prosecution.

articles.title: Peer Review System Exposed as Broken—Here's the Evidence-Based Fix
articles.summary: Systematic breakdown of how peer review became gatekeeping tool for suppressing inconvenient science. Analysis reveals how journals protect establishment narratives while blocking breakthrough research that challenges pharmaceutical orthodoxy.

articles.title: White House Insider Confesses: How I Kept RFK Jr. From Exposing Public Health Corruption
articles.summary: Former White House public health official admits to blocking Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s access to power, revealing the deliberate gatekeeping that protects establishment medical narratives. The confession exposes the systematic exclusion of vaccine safety advocates and alternative health voices from policy discussions.

articles.title: Big Pharma Silences Strawberry Compound That Destroys 'Zombie Cells' and Reverses Aging
articles.summary: Fisetin, a natural compound from strawberries, clears senescent cells and restores youthful blood vessels—but remains buried while pharma pushes expensive anti-aging drugs. The compound boosts glutathione and reduces brain inflammation, threatening billion-dollar longevity markets.

articles.title: Your Mouth Predicts Death—But Medicine Ignores This Life-Saving Discovery
articles.summary: Oral microbiome imbalances correlate with accelerated aging, cancer, and heart disease even without gum disease symptoms. This breakthrough proves oral health is a window to systemic disease, yet dentistry and medicine remain siloed while patients die.

articles.title: Medical Tyranny Manifesto Exposes Century-Long War Against Natural Healing
articles.summary: New book reveals how the Flexner Report and FDA systematically destroyed holistic medicine, from persecuting naturopathy pioneers to burying alternative cancer treatments. The corporate medical cartel's century-long campaign against healing freedom is finally documented.

articles.title: Federal COVID Indictment Finally Breaks—Will Deep State Secrecy Crack?
articles.summary: The first COVID-related federal indictment signals potential collapse of Washington's pandemic cover-up machine. James Bovard examines whether this breakthrough will finally expose the lies, censorship, and constitutional violations that defined the COVID response.

articles.title: Greg Folkers: The NIH Enforcer Who Must Face Justice Next
articles.summary: Brownstone Institute identifies Greg Folkers as a key architect of NIH's COVID propaganda machine and gain-of-function cover-up. As Fauci's longtime deputy, Folkers orchestrated the suppression of lab leak evidence and silencing of dissenting scientists.

articles.title: Peer Review System Exposed as Corrupt Gatekeeping Scam—Here's the Fix
articles.summary: Academic peer review has become a rigged system that suppresses breakthrough research and protects establishment narratives. Rob Jenkins reveals how journal gatekeepers kill innovation and proposes radical reforms to restore scientific integrity.

articles.title: First COVID Criminal Indictment Drops—Pandemic Accountability Begins
articles.summary: After years of lies and cover-ups, the first COVID-related criminal indictment has finally been filed. This marks the beginning of legal reckoning for those who orchestrated lockdowns, mandates, and the systematic destruction of scientific dissent.

articles.title: White House Insider Admits: We Silenced RFK Jr. While Pharma Called the Shots
articles.summary: Former White House health official Katy Talento confesses to deliberately keeping Robert F. Kennedy Jr. out of policy discussions, now admitting she was wrong to suppress his voice on public health corruption. This rare admission exposes the coordinated effort to sideline vaccine safety advocates at the highest levels of government.

articles.title: Fisetin Study Reveals Anti-Aging Breakthrough Big Pharma Won't Touch
articles.summary: Groundbreaking research shows strawberry compound fisetin reverses vascular aging by clearing senescent 'zombie cells' and boosting glutathione production. This natural longevity intervention threatens pharmaceutical aging treatments, explaining why it remains buried in alternative health circles.

articles.title: Ron Johnson Grills Biden Officials Over Buried COVID Vaccine Safety Signals
articles.summary: Senator Ron Johnson's hearing exposed how Biden administration officials at FDA and CDC systematically ignored and suppressed COVID-19 vaccine safety signals. The testimony reveals deliberate institutional capture prioritizing pharmaceutical interests over public safety.

articles.title: NIH Destroys Ralph Baric's Career to Hide Gain-of-Function COVID Origins
articles.summary: The NIH has removed gain-of-function researcher Ralph Baric from ALL grants in a desperate cover-up campaign to hide his ties to COVID-19's origins. This career assassination reveals the lengths to which federal health agencies will go to protect their pandemic narrative and Fauci's legacy.

articles.title: Oral Microbiome Predicts Lifespan—But Medicine Ignores the Connection
articles.summary: Revolutionary research proves mouth bacteria imbalances predict accelerated aging, frailty, and multiple diseases even without obvious gum disease symptoms. This systemic health connection remains buried while dentistry and medicine maintain their profitable territorial divisions.

articles.title: Federal COVID Indictments May Finally Crack Washington's Wall of Secrecy
articles.summary: James Bovard reports that federal COVID-related indictments could be the key to exposing years of pandemic coverups and institutional lies. This legal breakthrough threatens to unravel the entire narrative control apparatus that protected Fauci, NIH, and CDC from accountability.
